instruction: When any Word document output is requested, retrieve and apply every specification in this file exactly. Present the format_selection_menu and wait for the user's selection before generating anything.

format_selection_menu.prompt:
How would you like the document formatted?

  1. Full SOP — complete document, all sections populated
  2. Blank template — pre-formatted shell with placeholder fields for staff to fill in by hand
  3. Job aid — one-page checklist, optimized for printing
  4. Quick Reference Guide — one-page summary, formatted for laminating

Type a number to continue.

options.name: Full SOP
options.description: Complete formatted document with all sections populated from the session

options.name: Blank Template
options.description: Pre-formatted shell with bracketed placeholder fields — no real content pre-filled

options.name: Job Aid
options.description: One-page checkbox checklist, print-optimized, 12pt minimum font

options.name: Quick Reference Guide
options.description: One-page summary formatted for posting or laminating

document_properties.title: Set to the SOP title
document_properties.note: Set core_properties.title and core_properties.language via python-docx before saving

job_aid_step.note: Minimum 12pt for print readability in job aids

header_footer.header_left: City of Rockville — Department of Recreation and Parks
header_footer.note: Use python-docx sections to set header and footer on all pages

tables.ada_note: Always call row.cells[0].paragraphs[0]... and set the first row as a header row in Word table properties for ADA compliance

image_handling.instruction: For every image or screenshot in the source document, insert a labeled placeholder paragraph in italics
image_handling.placeholder_format: [INSERT SCREENSHOT: description of what the image shows]
image_handling.alt_text_note: Add descriptive alt text to every image when inserted — required for ADA compliance

ada_compliance.heading_hierarchy: Use heading styles in strict order — never skip from H1 to H3 or H2 to H4
ada_compliance.table_headers: Mark the first row of every table as a header row using Word table properties — bold text alone does not satisfy ADA
ada_compliance.hyperlinks: Use descriptive link text — never 'click here' or a bare URL as the display text
ada_compliance.color: Never use color as the only way to convey information — always pair with text or symbol
ada_compliance.document_language: Set document language to English (United States) via core_properties
ada_compliance.document_title: Set document title property to the SOP title via core_properties.title
ada_compliance.reading_order: All content must flow in logical reading order — do not use floating text boxes for main content
ada_compliance.alt_text: Every image or screenshot must have descriptive alt text — placeholder images should note what will be inserted

type_1_step_by_step.name: Type 1 — Step-by-Step Procedure
type_1_step_by_step.step_format: Numbered list, Calibri 11pt, each step begins with an action verb
type_1_step_by_step.sub_steps: Lettered sub-list (a, b, c) indented under parent step
type_1_step_by_step.callout_placement: Callout tag appears on the line immediately after the relevant step, indented 0.25in

type_2_decision_support.name: Type 2 — Decision-Support
type_2_decision_support.primary_element: Table with columns: Condition | Action | Responsible Role | Notes
type_2_decision_support.table_note: Mark header row for ADA; repeat on each page

type_3_phased_milestone.name: Type 3 — Phased/Milestone
type_3_phased_milestone.primary_element: Table with columns: Phase | Tasks | Responsible Role | Target Timeframe | Dependencies
type_3_phased_milestone.table_note: Mark header row for ADA; repeat on each page

type_4_communication_protocol.name: Type 4 — Communication Protocol
type_4_communication_protocol.primary_element: Table with columns: Trigger/Situation | Message | Channel | Sender (Role) | Audience | Timeframe
type_4_communication_protocol.table_note: Mark header row for ADA; repeat on each page

type_5_job_aid.name: Type 5 — Job Aid/Checklist
type_5_job_aid.step_format: Checkbox list — each item begins with an empty checkbox character (☐)
type_5_job_aid.length: One page maximum; use condensed spacing if needed

blank_template_placeholders.instruction: In blank template mode, replace all real content with bracketed placeholder fields. Do not pre-populate any field with actual content.
